title: Collecting The Manga
wikitext:
[]: Collecting The Manga             Quote Post by Santo » Fri Apr 15, 2011 6:42 pm So, I walked into a local comic shop and found NGE volume 10 for $5. I never bothered buying any of the other volumes of the manga before but $5 was extremely affordable and it was in Like-New condition, so I decided to buy it. So, I decided since I have one volume... I may as well start buying the others. Then I found out how ridiculously rare some of the others are. Do you guys have any tips on finding the rare ones?

[]: Re: Collecting The Manga             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Apr 15, 2011 6:56 pm Santo wrote: So, I walked into a local comic shop and found NGE volume 10 for $5. I never bothered buying any of the other volumes of the manga before but $5 was extremely affordable and it was in Like-New condition, so I decided to buy it. So, I decided since I have one volume... I may as well start buying the others. Then I found out how ridiculously rare some of the others are. Do you guys have any tips on finding the rare ones?

[]: Re: Collecting The Manga             Quote Post by Santo » Fri Apr 15, 2011 7:21 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Volume 9 is the only one that really qualifies as rare. 1-8 are uncommon. 10-12 are pretty common. My suggestion is to try to get the entire series is a single lot, including #9 from eBay, so it will be more worth your while, because you will pay good money to get volume 9. Alternatively, you can try buying the Australian version of #9, which is more easy to come by. Also, while you're at it, write to Viz, express your woes. Tell them to do another printing of the manga.

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Fri Apr 15, 2011 7:58 pm I bought volumes 1-10 on Ebay for $110 total. The local Barnes and Noble hasn't the original series for sale. I've been considering scanning the manga online, but I doubt that I will, and I'm kinda not aloud to say where it is.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Apr 15, 2011 8:11 pm TehDonutKing wrote: I bought volumes 1-10 on Ebay for $110 total.

[]: Re: Collecting The Manga             Quote Post by Seen » Fri Apr 15, 2011 8:43 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Also, while you're at it, write to Viz, express your woes. Tell them to do another printing of the manga.

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Fri Apr 15, 2011 10:17 pm I just hate that some of their manga is censored or otherwise altered.

[]:             Quote Post by Alastor » Fri Apr 15, 2011 10:21 pm I also loathe how Viz will short print a volume or cancel a series halfway finished . *cough*Kurohime*cough*

[]: Re: Collecting The Manga             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Apr 15, 2011 10:22 pm Seen wrote: I despise Viz for what they do to their properties. WHY THE FUCK IS VOLUME 7 SELLING FOR $150 ON AMAZON. THIS ISN'T AN ORIGINAL FIRST VOLUME OF A BATMAN COMIC. JESUS CHRIST.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Sat Apr 16, 2011 12:23 am Buy the Chuang Yi versions guys, they're way better in every way to the Viz ones. COLOUR FRONT PAGES!

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Sat Apr 16, 2011 6:29 pm Are they English?

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sat Apr 16, 2011 7:26 pm Or you could just go german or something like that for volume 9.

[]: Re: Collecting The Manga             Quote Post by LordEvan88 » Sat Apr 16, 2011 9:54 pm Seen wrote: I despise Viz for what they do to their properties. WHY THE FUCK IS VOLUME 7 SELLING FOR $150 ON AMAZON. THIS ISN'T AN ORIGINAL FIRST VOLUME OF A BATMAN COMIC. JESUS CHRIST.

[]: Re: Collecting The Manga             Quote Post by Kodaemon » Sun Apr 17, 2011 12:06 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: You do know that Viz has very little to do with that, right? Books go out of print and sell for high prices all of the time.

[]: Re: Collecting The Manga             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Apr 17, 2011 12:24 pm Kodaemon wrote: Well, I know that the NGE manga's publisher here in Poland ( J.P.F. ) periodically does limited reprints of most of their stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by insomniac » Tue Apr 19, 2011 1:26 am I've tried looking for them as a set, since I've noticed some did seem to be rarer than others, but never had any luck with that, and I only wanted to buy the version with the newer and more formal looking masthead design. (The one in the serif font) It's a shame the local Borders here only stocks the one with the old masthead, so looking for some of the older volumes there isn't an option. If only they were reprinted periodically like what they do with Traditional Chinese prints of manga.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Tue Apr 19, 2011 2:27 am TehDonutKing wrote: Are they English?

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Tue Apr 19, 2011 4:12 pm Fazmotron wrote: Yes, ofcourse.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Wed Apr 20, 2011 4:07 am No, why would they be censored?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Apr 20, 2011 8:59 am Fazmotron wrote: No, why would they be censored?
